# The Observatory

The Observatory is a public, interactive living map of the BC + AI, ED + AI, and Futureproof ecosystem.

Canonical homepage: https://official.observer/
About: https://official.observer/about
Public graph API: https://official.observer/api/v1/graph
Dataset license: CC BY 4.0 (https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/)
Source repository: https://github.com/WalksWithASwagger/official-observer
